# ToolContext.ListRootsAsync method

Asks the client for its filesystem roots (spec §21), through the multi-round-trip mechanism (§11). Requires the client to have declared the (deprecated) `roots` capability, else `-32003` (§11.5).

```csharp
public Task<IReadOnlyList<Root>> ListRootsAsync()
```

## Return Value

The client's roots.
